reasoning: The control 3.1.1 focuses on limiting system access to authorized users and processes. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that RBAC policies enforce least privilege and avoid the use of overly permissive roles like cluster-admin. Additionally, NetworkPolicies should be used to restrict ingress traffic by default, and services should avoid using NodePort to prevent exposing services unnecessarily. These measures collectively help in limiting access to authorized entities only.
title: 3_1_1: 3.1.1 Limit system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, and devices (including other systems)
